risk_if_not_implemented: Without Removal, Masking, Encryption, Hashing or Replacement of Direct Identifiers, sensitive data may be exposed to interception or unauthorized disclosure, resulting in confidentiality breaches.

compensating_control_1.name: Data Protection
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of data protection controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Data Protection (DCH-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Removal, Masking, Encryption, Hashing or Replacement of Direct Identifiers (DCH-23.4) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Data applicability. Given the data-handling focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: De-Identification (Anonymization)
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to anonymize data by removing Personal Data (PD) from datasets.
compensating_control_2.justification: De-Identification (Anonymization) (DCH-23) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Removal, Masking, Encryption, Hashing or Replacement of Direct Identifiers (DCH-23.4) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Data applicability. Given the data-handling focus of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
